question: What makes MTC different from other contractors?
answer: Three things set us apart: Fixed pricing — our written quotes do not change unless you change the scope. What we quote is what you pay. Licensed trades — every electrician, plumber, and specialist on your project is licensed and insured. No unlicensed labour, ever. On-time delivery — we schedule projects carefully, staff them properly, and communicate proactively if anything shifts. We also have 50+ five-star Google reviews from Burlington and Hamilton homeowners who can tell you firsthand. We are a local team, not a franchise. You deal directly with us from first call to final walkthrough.
